title: Compliance — Drug, Alcohol, and Tobacco Policies
content: Morgan State University maintains a tobacco- and smoke-free campus environment, documented through the MSU Board of Regents Policy Page and an accompanying policy document (Smoke_Tobacco_Free_Campus.pdf). The university is committed to a campus that is free of the illegal and/or abusive use of drugs and alcohol, with its Drug and Alcohol Abuse Policy posted on the Board of Regents Policy Page and in an accompanying document (Drug_Alcohol_Abuse_Policy.pdf). Both policies apply to faculty, staff, students, and visitors and are administered alongside other compliance functions by the Office of Research Administration for research-related inquiries: ask.ora@morgan.edu, 443-885-4044, Tyler Hall, Student Service Building, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251.
